provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring civilization, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, ancient reptilian alien with faded grey-green scales and a massive crest ridge worn smooth by decades, milky amber eyes that can barely see but he does not need to see to fight, a heavy scarred tail missing the last three inches, wearing dark bronze armor that has been repaired so many times every plate is a different shade of patina, a faded crimson sash that was bright red fifty years ago, an old sword that has been resharpened until the blade is half its original width, he trains the young warriors and they are terrified of him
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
